$comment: Cache file for inbound report discovery (P079 / ADR-062). Written by /wr-itil:review-problems Step 8.5 after each discovery pass.
$last_pass_note: 2026-05-30 review-problems discovery pass (work-problems Step 0b preflight, TTL-expiry auto-recheck; cache age ~4.4 days exceeded ttl_seconds 86400). github-issues: 34 active [problem] reports, all maintainer-authored, all already mirrored locally (P198-P229 series + P228/P282-class); #149 remains CLOSED upstream. discussions skipped (HTTP 410 — disabled for repo); security-advisories poll skipped (P276/P198/#125 external-comms gate misclassification — preserved per prior-pass evidence). No new unmatched third-party reports. Pipeline classification remains deferred per 2026-05-15 user direction.
